rateLimited: Yawan buƙatu da yawa a yanzu. Da fatan za a sake gwadawa bayan ɗan lokaci.
requestFailed: Ba mu iya kammala wannan buƙatar ba. Da fatan za a sake gwadawa.

backend.workspaceAdminRequired: Ana bukatar damar admin na workspace.
backend.workspaceOwnerRequired: Ana bukatar damar mai mallakar workspace.
backend.onlyOwnersAssignAdmin: Masu mallakar workspace ne kawai za su iya ba da matsayin admin.
backend.onlyOwnersManageAdmins: Masu mallakar workspace ne kawai za su iya sarrafa admins.
backend.onlyOwnersRemoveAdmins: Masu mallakar workspace ne kawai za su iya cire admins.
backend.ownersCannotChangeRole: Ba za a iya canza matsayin mai mallakar workspace a nan ba. Ka canja mallaka tukuna.
backend.ownersCannotBeRemoved: Ba za a iya cire mai mallakar workspace ba. Ka canja mallaka tukuna.
backend.cannotChangeOwnRole: Ba za ka iya canza matsayinka na workspace ba.
backend.cannotRemoveSelf: Ba za ka iya cire kanka daga workspace ba.
backend.onlyAssignableRoles: Matsayin admin, member, da guest ne kawai za a iya bayarwa.
backend.memberNotFound: Ba a sami waccan memba na workspace ba.
backend.invitationNotFound: Ba a sami waccan gayyatar ba.
backend.transferTargetMustBeMember: Zaɓi wani memba don canja masa mallaka.
backend.emailInvalid: Wannan adireshin imel din bai yi kyau ba.
backend.externalGuestDisabled: An hana gayyatar baƙi na waje ta hanyar manufar kungiya.
backend.verifiedDomainRequired: Membobin kungiya dole ne su yi amfani da ingantaccen yankin kungiya.
backend.workspaceUrlInUse: Wannan URL din workspace an riga an yi amfani da shi.
